headline: Intel’s AI Rackscale Push And Agentic Clouds Confront Valuation Risks
summary: Intel (NasdaqGS:INTC) is expanding its AI focus toward full rackscale systems and infrastructure, working with partners such as Foxconn and SambaNova. The company is supporting disaggregated, agentic AI inference clouds, highlighted by a joint rackscale inference demo at Computex. New alliances with Siemens and Hitachi, plus PC collaborations and the Vector Core Compute platform, aim to address enterprise AI and inference workloads.
